name: Alerts Over Time By Severity
description: This visual shows the number of alerts over time split by severity - useful to identify trends in alert severity over time.. Informational alerts are excluded from this graph.

name: Top blocked IPs
description: This visualization shows the top destination IP addresses that internal hosts attempted to connect to but were blocked by the firewall, ranked by the number of blocked attempts. It helps identify potentially risky or unauthorized outbound connections, such as communication with known malicious hosts, command-and-control servers, or unintended external services.
